description: Configure the Jitsi Meet deployment for a restrictive compliance environment. Update /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js to disable mobile app promotion (MOBILE_APP_PROMO: false), redirect the watermark link to https://intranet.securehealth.com, and redirect the streaming help link to https://intranet.securehealth.com/streaming. Modify the TOOLBAR_BUTTONS list to remove the 'invite' and 'security' buttons while retaining standard buttons such as 'microphone', 'camera', 'chat', and 'desktop'.
